title: salvia whitehousei
intro: Salvia whitehousei, also known as the Whitehouse sage or Whitehouse salvia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sage family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Salvia whitehousei include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. The herbal preparations of Salvia whitehousei typically include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
